content.body: Yeah, i said in the whatnot meeting (the context was the time proposals) that i disagree with that as stated but i do believe that speculative polyfilling definitely needs to take more care than i think we've given it. It was a topic thats been discussed a long time and i still don't think its often done carefully.
Ah the reservation minutes were about "supporting polyfills being a standards goal". This is different from "polyfilling is undesirable"
I do resonate with *that* - adding some lower level knob to support polyfilling can lead to some quirky corners in the web platform that have a poor maintenance cost/usefulness benefit balance.
content.formatted_body: I do resonate with that - adding some lower level knob to support polyfilling can lead to some quirky corners in the web platform that have a poor maintenance cost/usefulness benefit balance.

content.body: * Ah the reservation from minutes were about "creating enablers for polyfills should not be a standards goal". This is different from "polyfilling is undesirable"

m.new_content.body: Ah the reservation from minutes were about "creating enablers for polyfills should not be a standards goal". This is different from "polyfilling is undesirable"
